column1: Luis Arraez stands out as the safest pick, hitting second at home with a strong track record of consistency and a favorable platoon advantage against Miles Mikolas. Yandy Diaz offers similar reliability atop Tampa Bay’s lineup, coming in hot and facing a soft matchup with a park boost. Jackson Chourio and Ernie Clement also present steady options with platoon edges, but Arraez’s combination of contact skills and matchup makes him the top choice for Beat The Streak.
